siteInfo.tagline: Global HR Expertise, Delivered in Days

hero.headline: Global HR Expertise, Delivered in Days
hero.subheadline: 10 years of corporate HR leadership. Fast, reliable talent solutions for international clients.

about.title: Why Choose Edjobster?
about.description: With a decade of senior HR leadership across Fortune 500 companies, I bring deep expertise in international talent acquisition and strategic workforce planning. My approach combines rapid execution with meticulous attention to cultural fit and compliance requirements.

differentiators.title: Global Network
differentiators.description: Extensive connections across 25+ countries with vetted talent pools and local market expertise.

differentiators.title: Rapid Delivery
differentiators.description: Average 48-hour response time with qualified candidate profiles delivered within days, not weeks.

differentiators.title: Compliance Expert
differentiators.description: Deep knowledge of international employment law, visa requirements, and cultural integration best practices.

services.title: Services & Offerings
services.description: Comprehensive HR solutions tailored for global businesses seeking rapid, reliable talent acquisition and strategic workforce development.

servicesList.title: Executive Search
servicesList.description: C-suite and senior leadership recruitment across global markets with cultural fit assessment.

servicesList.title: Talent Acquisition
servicesList.description: End-to-end recruitment process from sourcing to onboarding for technical and professional roles.

servicesList.title: HR Compliance
servicesList.description: International employment law guidance, visa processing, and regulatory compliance consulting.

servicesList.title: Organizational Development
servicesList.description: Strategic workforce planning, team restructuring, and performance optimization programs.

servicesList.title: Market Entry Support
servicesList.description: Local hiring strategies and HR infrastructure setup for companies expanding into new markets.

servicesList.title: Interim HR Leadership
servicesList.description: Temporary executive placement and project-based HR management for transitional periods.

promotion.headline: Ready to Scale Your Global Team?
promotion.subheadline: Get matched with pre-vetted talent in your target market within 48 hours.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: A streamlined 3-step process designed to get you qualified candidates fast, with full transparency and regular updates throughout.

steps.title: Discovery & Strategy
steps.details: We discuss role requirements, cultural fit criteria, timeline, and compliance considerations for your target market.

steps.title: Sourcing & Screening
steps.description: Leverage my global network to find top talent
steps.details: Active sourcing from vetted talent pools, comprehensive screening, and cultural fit assessment within 48-72 hours.

steps.title: Present & Support
steps.description: Deliver qualified candidates with full support
steps.details: Detailed candidate profiles, interview coordination, offer negotiation, and onboarding support through completion.

testimonialsList.name: Michael Chen
testimonialsList.title: VP of Engineering

testimonialsList.name: Sarah Johnson

testimonialsList.quote: Outstanding talent acquisition for our Latin American operations. The cultural fit assessment was spot-on.

testimonialsList.name: Emma Thompson
testimonialsList.title: HR Director
testimonialsList.quote: Syed's global network is impressive. Found us a VP of Product in Toronto within 72 hours of our call.

clients.title: Trusted by Global Leaders
clients.description: From Fortune 500 corporations to fast-growing startups, I've helped organizations across industries build exceptional teams worldwide.

successStories.title: APAC Expansion Success
successStories.description: Helped a US fintech scale their Singapore operations from 0 to 50 employees in 6 months.

successStories.title: Executive Leadership Placement
successStories.description: Placed C-suite executives for 3 different companies entering the European market.

successStories.title: Compliance & Risk Management
successStories.description: Navigated complex visa requirements for 100+ international hires across 15 countries.

contact.title: Ready to Scale Your Global Team?
contact.description: Get in touch today and let's discuss how I can help you build an exceptional international workforce quickly and compliantly.
